text.message: just didnt wanna rob him twice in a row... i promise i dont think ur winning bro
I mean red is so good to be solo blocked by you
why are you not a threat?
i am robbing u bc ur winning and u solo me?
blue just ended his own game
when you stole from me 3 times
i thought we both agreed red should win then
but im willing to give you one more chance
im not your threat here blue

prolly want me to pop for army here no?
